title: User Datagram Protocol
content: UDP has source port, destination port, length and checksum fields. It is connectionless and does not provide retransmission semantics by itself.

title: Service Name and Transport Protocol Port Number Registry
content: Port 443 is the assigned port for https service. UDP traffic using source or destination 443 can appear in modern encrypted transports.

title: MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise Matrix
content: Periodic outbound traffic with regular intervals may indicate beaconing behavior. Detection requires timing analysis over multiple packets and context correlation.
